input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.8.1.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.8.1.5
            TITLE: entry gate -the path marked by cones which establishes the required path the vehicle must

            CONTENT:
            rule D.8.1.5: Entry Gate -The path marked by cones which establishes the required path the vehicle must
D.8.1.5 Entry Gate -The path marked by cones which establishes the required path the vehicle must 
take to enter the course.

final_answer: Entry Gate -The path marked by cones which establishes the required path the vehicle must take to enter the course.
